insight: Rhino's Prompt ability is a downside in blue-point (BP) comparisons against Tarsier, because Prompt units attack immediately on the turn they are bought and thus die before getting a second attack, whereas Tarsier, being non-Prompt, survives to deal its attack on the following turn. This makes Tarsier more BP-efficient than Rhino in many scenarios despite Rhino costing 1 less gold.
author: namington
context: wiwiweb asked why Tarsiers are more BP-efficient than Rhinos, and namington explained that Prompt is a downside in this context.

insight: The Lucina + Xeno + Centrifuge combination is considered one of the most broken Centrifuge combos in the game, and games featuring it as player 1 may be effectively lost for player 2 from the start. A possible P2 response is to mirror the strategy on slightly higher economy, though the presence of Xeno makes this awkward and it likely still loses.
author: mtanzer
context: Discussion of f0x's game loss, where mtanzer assessed the Lucina+Xeno+Centrifuge P1 combo as extremely powerful and possibly game-breaking.

insight: As player 2 in Lucina+Xeno+Centrifuge sets, a turn-and-a-half later Centrifuge line can sometimes work, but P2 lines are vulnerable to even slightly additional pressure because they rely on very precise turn sequences. Cluster Bolt may fit into the P1 build and beat P2's delayed Centrifuge line.
author: apooche
context: apooche shared analysis on P2 options in Lucina+Xeno+Centrifuge sets, noting the fragility of P2's delayed Centrifuge lines.
